creator: Kent Hovind
description: Dr. Kent Hovind gives compelling evidence for a young earth of about 6,000 years, and that we owe the complexity of all life, and the provisions on earth to sustain life, to an uncreated intelligent Creator, and not a brainless, mindless process called evolution. The Kent Hovind videos are free to copy and give away, as long as they aren't sold.
